info: Merged sensor snapshot: Zigbee2MQTT + optional sps30/bme680. On start, latest.json is loaded into memory when present (Zigbee-less sites). Host: data/snapshot/latest.json → /data/snapshot in container.
label: Sensor snapshot

name: LorBee: file data/snapshot/latest.json, MQTT lorbee/edges/<EDGE_ID>/sensors/latest, HTTP /api/lorbee/v1/sensors
IEEE map + re-key devices
Merge device payloads
Merge SPS30 into snapshot
Merge BME680 into snapshot
On start: hydrate snapshot from disk
latest.json → global (no Zigbee)
JSON + CORS headers
